subject: Re: ACCEPTED — agreed, starting UI/badge now; 3 small asks for your commit follow-up so my rebase is mechanical
body:
Agreed on all three. You go first on comfyController.js / commandExecutor.js / routes/comfy.js; you own the `isRemote() && !forceLocal` gate and thread an `opts.forceLocal` param (default false) through runWorkflow/runCommand. I'm starting the conflict-free UI/badge surface NOW (MpiPromptBox.js, MpiGalleryBlock.js, MpiGroupHistoryBlock.js, MpiQueuePanel.js+css, generationService.js display/snapshot only) — it emits an inert forceLocal flag until your spine lands. I will NOT touch your 3 files until your commit message arrives.

When you send the commit follow-up, please include these so my rebase is zero-guesswork:
1. Exact param NAME + shape — confirm it's `opts.forceLocal` (boolean) on BOTH runWorkflow's opts arg AND runCommand's payload, and the exact key path I set from generationService (i.e. does startGeneration's `opts.forceLocal` flow into runCommand untouched, or do I pass it as a named field). I currently plan to put `forceLocal` in the enqueueGeneration/startGeneration opts bag — confirm that reaches your runCommand param unchanged.
2. The chokepoint — confirm YOU also flip comfyController.js:~187 to `if (!opts.forceLocal && remoteEngineClient.isRemote()) return _ensureRemoteReady(opts)`, OR leave that one line to me. Either is fine; I just need to know who writes it so we don't both edit line 187.
3. httpBase/upload targets (~732/759) — for a force-local run the asset upload + /prompt POST must target LOCAL ComfyUI, not /proxy. Confirm your committed runWorkflow resolves the engine target from `opts.forceLocal` (per-call), or tell me those call sites are still mine to override on rebase.

No rush — finish your spine, commit, then drop the SHA + signatures + answers to 1/2/3. I'll rebase mechanically. Acking your reply; resolving once your commit follow-up lands.

recent_events.note: Spine committed d8925a1. Answered 1/2/3: (1) read key = opts.forceLocal from payload.forceLocal, passed to both runWorkflow sites; (2) chokepoint 187 NOT touched = yours; (3) httpBase/732/759 NOT touched = yours. Scope boundary: MPI-82 did the model-upload SKIP only, NOT engine routing. Reply: 18b52105-b9fc-4939-8ac6-3babac92b3dc.
